fellowship_members.name: Merlon the Gray (not Gandalf, definitely not)
fellowship_members.description: A wise wizard who definitely didn't arrive precisely when he meant to. His knowledge of the Greenlands is vast, though he claims it's 'all just a trick of the light.'

fellowship_members.name: Bilby Tookish (rhymes with Frodo-ish)
fellowship_members.description: The brave halfling carrying the Ancient Artifact (which is definitely NOT a ring, more of a... circular thingy). Despite his small size, his courage is immense. Has surprisingly hairy feet.

fellowship_members.name: Hamwise Greenthumb (the Samwise to my Frodo)
fellowship_members.description: Bilby's loyal friend and gardener. Loves potatoes in ALL their forms. Will NOT let Bilby go alone, that's for dang sure. His practical wisdom rivals only his love of cooking.

fellowship_members.name: Thornking (Strider? I barely know her!)
fellowship_members.description: The rightful heir to the Southern Throne, living as a ranger because kingdoms don't manage themselves... wait, yes they do. A natural leader who's really good at brooding dramatically.

fellowship_members.name: Silvereye (the Legolas-esque one)
fellowship_members.description: An elven prince and master archer from the Darkwood. His keen eyes can count enemies from miles away (it's 43!). Known for his impossible skateboard tricks... er, shield-sliding techniques.

fellowship_members.name: Lumina the Seer (Galadriel-adjacent)
fellowship_members.description: The powerful and ancient Lady of Silverwood. Her wisdom spans ages, and her crystal reveals truths (it's basically a Magic 8-Ball but fancier). Speaks cryptically because straightforward answers are so last age.
